body: Anyone seen any good movies lately? Need something for movie night.
Watched Everything Everywhere All at Once again. Still holds up on the third viewing, maybe even better.
That movie is incredible. The hot dog fingers universe still makes me laugh every time.
I just watched Past Lives — really beautiful and understated. Made me think about roads not taken.
Both great picks. I'll go with Past Lives tonight, been meaning to see it for months.
